title: How to reorder tasks? Is there a way to pin more than 5 items to a task list?
excerpt: I’m trying to manually reorder a series of tasks and the only way I know is to pin them too the top in reverse order.  Unfortunately, it seems I’m only able to pin 5 tasks at a time- anyway to resolve this?

posts.author: james_MA (James West-Herr)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to manually reorder a series of tasks and the only way I know is to pin them too the top in reverse order. Unfortunately, it seems I’m only able to pin 5 tasks at a time- anyway to resolve this?
